# SKActionTimingMode.linear

**Case**

Specifies linear pacing. Linear pacing causes an animation to occur evenly over its duration.

## Declaration

```swift
case linear
```

## Constants

- **SKActionTimingMode.easeIn**: Specifies ease-in pacing. Ease-in pacing causes the animation to begin slowly and then speed up as it progresses.
- **SKActionTimingMode.easeOut**: Specifies ease-out pacing. Ease-out pacing causes the animation to begin quickly and then slow as it completes.
- **SKActionTimingMode.easeInEaseOut**: Specifies ease-in ease-out pacing. An ease-in ease-out animation begins slowly, accelerates through the middle of its duration, and then slows again before completing.
